Registration.title: Registration
Registration.description: Student survey registration for bilingual classes

studentName.description: The exact full name of the student from class 10A7

selectedSubjects.description: An array of selected bilingual subjects

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 string of when the registration was submitted

/registrations/{studentName}.description: Survey response for a specific student, identified by their unique name
